---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Morphology quantification (longest-neurite length + neurite count) under DMSO / Taxol / Nocodazole, WT + Arp3 KO

## What this file does

Reads per-neuron morphology CSVs from `folder_path` (`list.files` at line 53,
loaded line 56) for the Taxol / Nocodazole treatment experiment. Per-neuron
longest-neurite length and neurite count are pooled by genotype (WT, Arp3 KO)
and treatment (DMSO, 75 nM nocodazole, 5 nM Taxol). One multi-panel PDF is
written (`ggsave` at line 164) showing violin distributions for both metrics.

## Manuscript panels

- **Fig 5b**: "Percentage of neurons at 48 h post-plating in polarization
  stages. N = 4 experiments. Error bar shows mean +/- SEM."
- **Fig 5c**: "Length of the longest neurite at 48 h post-plating. WT_DMSO:
  236; WT_Noco: 212; WT_Taxol: 236; KO_DMSO: 204; KO_Noco: 42; KO_Taxol: 167
  from 4 independent experiments."
- **Fig 5d**: "Number of neurites. WT_DMSO: 86; WT_Noco: 60; WT_Taxol: 41;
  KO_DMSO: 80; KO_Noco: 32; KO_Taxol: 55 from 2 experiments."

Source Data: `Fig 5b`, `Fig 5c`, `Fig 5d`.

## Outputs

- One multi-panel violin PDF (`ggsave` at line 164).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 5_myosin/Fig. 5a/Taxol_noc_expts/Morpho_quant.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE}

library(pracma)
# library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(circular)
library("gridExtra") 
library("ggExtra") 
library("ggpubr")
```

```{r Load RData, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Morpho_quant.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

#save.image(file=saved_path)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(data.table)

# set the directory where the CSV files are located
folder_path <- dir

# recursively find all CSV files in the directory and subdirectories
file_paths <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

# read all CSV files into a list of data frames
data_list <- file_paths %>% map(read.csv)

for (n in 1:length(data_list)){
  
  data_list[[n]]$Path <- file_paths[n]
  
}

# combine all data frames into a single data frame
data_df <- data_list %>% reduce(bind_rows) %>% as.data.table()

data_df$Arp3 <- "WT"
data_df$Treatment <- "Taxol"
data_df$Batch <- "series_1"

data_df[data_df$Path %like% "WT", ]$Arp3 <- "WT"
data_df[data_df$Path %like% "DMSO", ]$Treatment <- "DMSO"
data_df[data_df$Path %like% "series2", ]$Batch <- "series_2"
data_df[data_df$Path %like% "series3", ]$Batch <- "series_3"
data_df[data_df$Path %like% "series4", ]$Batch <- "series_4"

data_df$Arp3_treatment <- paste(data_df$Arp3, data_df$Treatment, sep= "_")

data_df <- data_df %>% as.data.table()

data_df$Cell <- "test"
n <- data_df[Length == 0] %>% nrow()

data_df[Length == 0]$Cell <- paste("Cell_", 1:n, sep="")

for (n in 2:nrow(data_df))
{
  if(data_df$Length[n] > 0){
    
    data_df$Cell[n] <- data_df$Cell[n-1]

    } else {
              }

}
```

# Extract cell level dataframe
```{r}
df_Cell<- data_df[Length == 0]
df_Cell$Longest <- 0
df_Cell$Longest_2 <- 0
df_Cell$Neurite_No <- 0

for (n in 1:nrow(df_Cell))
{
df_Cell$Longest[n] <- data_df[ Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]]$Length %>% max() # get the longest neurite length
df_Cell$Neurite_No[n] <- data_df[Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]] %>% nrow() - 1 # get the neurite number
}

for (n in 1:nrow(df_Cell))
{
  
  if(df_Cell$Neurite_No[n] >= 2){
    
    x <- data_df[ Cell == df_Cell$Cell[n]]$Length %>% sort()
    df_Cell$Longest_2[n] <- x[length(x)-1]

    } else { 
      
      df_Cell$Longest_2[n] <- 0 
      
              }
}

```


```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=5}
df_Cell[Longest_2 <70 & Treatment == "Taxol"]$Arp3_treatment %>% table()
my_comparisons <- list( c("WT_DMSO", "WT_Taxol"))

ggplot(df_Cell, aes(x=Arp3_treatment, y=Longest_2, fill=Arp3_treatment)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, fill="white")+
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-100 ,350), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
#stat_kruskal_test(aes(group = Arp3_treatment), label = "p.format")
  #stat_compare_means(label.y = 22)     # Add global p-value 


```
```{r}
df_Cell%>% 
  easyGgplot2::ggplot2.violinplot(yName="P2rx3", xName='Ident.2', groupName='Ident.2', 
                     addDot=TRUE, dotSize=1,dotPosition="jitter", jitter=0.2, 
                     trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")  +
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  scale_fill_npg()+ 
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) +
 # stat_compare_means(ref.group = "4", label = "p.signif", method="wilcox.test", label.y = 1200)+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
a <- ggplot(df_Cell, aes(x = Longest_2))

mu <- df_Cell %>% 
  group_by(Arp3_treatment) %>%
  summarise(grp.mean = mean(Longest_2))
mu

# Change fill color by sex and add mean line
# Use semi-transparent fill: alpha = 0.4
a + geom_density(aes(fill = Arp3_treatment), alpha = 0.4) +
  #geom_vline(aes(xintercept = grp.mean, color = Arp3_treatment), data = mu, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 70, linetype = "dashed")
  
```

```{r}
df_Cell %>% group_by(Batch)
```

```{r}
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, file = saved_path)

```
